name: Module Environment Debug
summary: Diagnose module, compiler, MPI, and library path conflicts.
description: This skill gathers read-only environment evidence to debug broken software stacks, conflicting modules, missing libraries, and compiler or MPI mismatches.

inputs.name: executable
inputs.description: Optional executable or shared library to inspect.

outputs.name: environment_report
outputs.description: A text report of loaded modules, compiler paths, MPI paths, and library search paths.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and example script.
Run on a login node and confirm it does not modify the active module environment.
